nasb.text: So Solomon observed the feast at that time for seven days, and all Israel with him, a very great assembly who came from the entrance of Hamath to the brook of Egypt.

esv.text: At that time Solomon held the feast for seven days, and all Israel with him, a very great assembly, from Lebo-hamath to the Brook of Egypt.

cnv.text: 那時，所羅門和全體以色列人，就是來自哈馬口，直到埃及小河的一群極大的會眾，一起舉行了七天的節期。

ccb.text: 所罗门和从哈马口直至埃及小河而来的全体以色列人聚成一大群会众，一起守节期七天。
